display_information.name: GrantProof
display_information.description: Finds the proof of your nonprofit's work across Slack, Sheets, and Drive, and drafts cited funder reports.
display_information.long_description: GrantProof scans your Slack workspace for evidence of program outcomes, impact metrics, and beneficiary stories. It cross-references Google Sheets and Drive documents, extracts citations, and drafts funder-ready impact reports with full source attribution.

slash_commands.description: Prepare a funder report from Slack evidence

agent_view.agent_description: GrantProof evidence assistant: finds proof of your nonprofit's impact across Slack, Sheets, and Drive.

actions.name: scan_slack
actions.description: Scan Slack conversations for impact evidence related to a specific funder or program

actions.name: cross_reference_sheets
actions.description: Look up supporting data in connected Google Sheets (metrics, outcomes, participant counts)

actions.name: draft_report_section
actions.description: Draft a funder report section with evidence citations

suggested_prompts.title: Prepare the Bright Futures July report
suggested_prompts.message: Prepare the Bright Futures July report

suggested_prompts.title: What impact evidence do we have for Teen Leadership?
suggested_prompts.message: What impact evidence do we have for Teen Leadership?
